name: cfn-name-check
description: Worst-case AWS resource name length checking for CloudFormation templates. Resolves !Sub/!Ref/!If expressions (including the stack name from your Description convention) and flags names that exceed AWS service limits before you deploy.

commands.title: CFN Name Check: Check Current File

cfnNameCheck.pythonPath.description: Path to the Python interpreter that has cfn-name-check installed. Empty = auto-detect (python3, then python, then py).

cfnNameCheck.stackName.description: Override stack name for all templates. Empty = parse from Description via descriptionRegex; if that fails, budget mode.

cfnNameCheck.descriptionRegex.description: Regex (one capture group) that extracts the stack name from the template Description. Change this if your naming convention changes.

cfnNameCheck.warnMargin.description: Emit a warning when a name is within this many characters of its limit.

cfnNameCheck.strictMode.description: Conservative mode: take the longest !If branch even when condition evaluation proves it unreachable.

cfnNameCheck.extraLimits.description: Additional limits: { "AWS::Some::Type": [["PropertyName", 64, "note"]] }. Merged with the built-in database.

cfnNameCheck.showBudgetHints.description: In budget mode (no stack name resolvable), show informational hints with the max stack-name length each property tolerates.

cfnNameCheck.debounceMs.description: Delay after typing stops before re-checking the document.
